mapper.select: select c.id as id, c.course_name as courseName, c.course_code as courseCode, c.teacher_id as teacherId, u.real_name as teacherName, c.description as description from course c left join user u on c.teacher_id = u.id order by c.id desc
mapper.insert: insert into course ( course_name, course_code, teacher_id, description ) values ( #{courseName}, #{courseCode}, #{teacherId}, #{description} )
mapper.select: select c.id as courseId, c.course_name as courseName, count(distinct uc.user_id) as studentCount, count(distinct hs.student_id) as submitCount, ( count(distinct uc.user_id) - count(distinct hs.student_id) ) as unSubmitCount, round(avg(sr.score),2) as averageScore, round( count(distinct hs.student_id) / count(distinct uc.user_id) *100, 2 ) as completeRate from course c left join user_course uc on c.id = uc.course_id left join homework h on c.id = h.course_id left join homework_submit hs on h.id = hs.homework_id left join score_record sr on hs.id = sr.submit_id group by c.id, c.course_name order by c.id

select c.id as courseId, c.course_name as courseName, count(distinct uc.user_id) as studentCount, count(distinct hs.student_id) as submitCount, (count(distinct uc.user_id) - count(distinct hs.student_id)) as unSubmitCount, round(avg(sr.score),2) as averageScore, round(count(distinct hs.student_id) / count(distinct uc.user_id) * 100, 2) as completeRate from course c left join user_course uc on c.id = uc.course_id left join homework h on c.id = h.course_id left join homework_submit hs on h.id = hs.homework_id left join score_record sr on hs.id = sr.submit_id where c.teacher_id = #{teacherId} group by c.id, c.course_name order by c.id
select count(*) from course where teacher_id = #{teacherId}
select count(distinct uc.user_id) from course c left join user_course uc on c.id = uc.course_id where c.teacher_id = #{teacherId}
mapper.update:
update course
set
course_name = #{courseName},
course_code = #{courseCode},
teacher_id = #{teacherId},
description = #{description}
where id = #{id}
